name: Bench Press
instructions: Set your shoulder blades and keep your feet planted.
Lower with control to the mid-chest.
Drive the bar up on a slightly arcing path.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set the bench to a moderate incline.
Lower dumbbells to upper chest level.
Press evenly through both arms.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Set hands under the shoulders and brace the core.
Lower the chest between the hands.
Press back to a tall plank.
tips: Scale with incline support if needed.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Set the pulleys slightly above shoulder height.
Bring the handles in a wide arc to the midline.
Return slowly while keeping tension.
tips: Lead with the elbows, not the hands.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Start from a controlled hang.
Pull the elbows down toward the ribs.
Lower under control to full arm extension.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit tall with thighs secured under the pads.
Pull elbows down toward the ribs.
Return the handle under control without shrugging.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge until the torso is angled forward.
Row the bar toward the lower ribs.
Lower with control while keeping the spine braced.
tips: Do not turn the row into a shrug.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand tall with palms facing forward.
Curl without swinging the torso.
Lower until elbows are almost straight.

name: Triceps Pushdown
instructions: Pin elbows near the sides.
Press the handle down until elbows extend.
Return slowly without letting shoulders roll forward.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Brace with the bar at upper chest height.
Press straight overhead.
Finish with biceps near the ears.
tips: Do not overarch the lower back.
Move the head through after the bar clears it.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand tall with dumbbells at the sides.
Raise arms out to shoulder height.
Lower slowly without losing tension.
tips: Use a load you can control.

name: Squat
instructions: Brace and set the bar securely on the upper back.
Sit between the hips while knees track over toes.
Drive up through the mid-foot.
tips: Keep the bar over the mid-foot.
Use a depth you can control.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Set feet shoulder-width on the platform.
Lower until hips stay controlled.
Press the platform away without locking knees hard.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold the bar close to the thighs.
Hinge back while keeping knees softly bent.
Stand tall by driving hips through.
tips: Stop when hamstring tension limits range.

name: Calf Raise
instructions: Set the balls of the feet on the platform.
Rise as high as possible.
Lower slowly into a controlled stretch.
tips: Avoid bouncing out of the bottom.
